basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 67 Posts
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (no hard copy to be sent)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Jodhpur has released the AIIMS Jodhpur Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Notification (Advt No. Academics/SR/62/2026-AIIMS.JDH) on 1st June 2026 at the official website aiimsjodhpur.edu.in. A total of 67 vacancies have been announced for the post of Senior Resident (Non DM/MCh.) as per the Government of India's Residency Scheme, across 24 departments. Online applications open from 1st June 2026 and the last date to apply is 30th June 2026 (Tuesday) by 17:00 hrs. The upper age limit is 45 years as on 30th June 2026, with relaxation for SC/ST (5 ye

application_fee.details: The application fee for AIIMS Jodhpur Senior Resident 2026 is ₹1,000/- for General/OBC/EWS candidates and ₹800/- for SC/ST candidates. PwBD candidates are fully exempt. Payment must be made online only and is non-refundable. | Payment must be made online only. Application fee once remitted shall not be refunded under any circumstances.

qualification.details: The upper age limit for AIIMS Jodhpur Senior Resident 2026 is 45 years as on 30th June 2026 (last date of application). Age relaxation is provided as per Government of India norms. | Note: No age relaxation is available to SC/ST/OBC candidates applying against unreserved (UR) vacancies. | The qualification required is a postgraduate medical/dental degree (MD/MS/DNB/MDS) in the relevant discipline from a recognised university/institution, as specified department-wise in the vacancy table above. For certain pre-clinical/para-clinical departments, M.Sc. with Ph.D. in the relevant subject is also accepted. Key points: | For most clinical departments: MD/MS/DNB in the specific specialty For Dentistry posts: MDS in the relevant dental specialty For Anatomy/Biochemistry: MD/DNB OR M.Sc. with Ph.D. in the relevant subject For School of Public Health: MD/DNB in Community Medicine/PSM OR MPH with Ph.D. Candidates must pass the qualifying examination with results declared by 31st August 2026 Candidates who have appeared for exam/viva voce with result awaited will be allowed to appear provisionally Registration with Medical Council of India / State Medical Council is mandatory (DCI for Dentistry candidates) Foreign graduates must hold a valid FMGE certificate conducted by NBE

vacancy_details.Qualification Required: MD/DNB in Anatomy OR M.Sc. (Human Anatomy) with PhD
MD/DNB in Biochemistry OR M.Sc. (Biochemistry) with PhD
MD/DNB in Diagnostic and Interventional Radiology
MD/DNB in Community Medicine/PSM OR MPH with PhD

salary_details.other allowances: As per Central Government / 7th CPC rules
salary_details.details: AIIMS Jodhpur Senior Resident 2026 pay scale is Level-11 of the Pay Matrix under 7th CPC, with an entry pay of ₹67,700/- per month plus Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) and other admissible allowances. NPA is applicable only for Medical (MBBS) candidates.

selection_process: Selection for AIIMS Jodhpur Senior Resident 2026 is based on a 100-mark merit system comprising three weighted components. The examination and interview will be conducted at AIIMS
Candidates will be called for Interview in a 1:6 ratio - for every 1 post

only 6 candidates will be called for interview Eligible candidates list for interview/MCQ exam will be uploaded on aiimsjodhpur.edu.in A separate notice regarding schedule of examination and interview will be uploaded on the institute website List of selected candidates will also be published on the institute website
Academic Record Scoring: Academic marks are based on MBBS/BDS marks
extra attempts in MBBS/BDS and MD/MS/DNB/MDS
and PubMed-indexed publications. Candidates with research publications in indexed journals will have a distinct advantage.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online through the AIIMS Jodhpur official website. No hard copy should be sent to the institute. Follow these steps:
Visit the official AIIMS Jodhpur website: www.aiimsjodhpur.edu.in
Navigate to the Recruitment/Academics section and click on the Senior Resident 2026 notification link.
Read the advertisement carefully. Note that you can apply for only one department.
Register and fill in the online application form with accurate personal, qualification, and experience details.
Pay the application fee online as per your category (see Fee section below). Fee once paid is non-refundable.
Upload all required documents/certificates as specified.
Submit the online application before 30th June 2026 by 17:00 hrs.
Do NOT send any hard copy of the application or documents to AIIMS Jodhpur.
Check the institute website regularly for interview/screening exam schedule and result updates.

Government Employees: Candidates currently serving in any Government institution must submit a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer at the time of interview. Candidates without NOC will not be permitted to appear for the interview.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Jodhpur Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Official Notification

faq.question: Q1. What is the application date range and where can I download the notification PDF?
faq.answer: Application dates: 1st June 2026 to 30th June 2026 (Tuesday) by 17:00 hrs.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available and for which post?
faq.answer: Total vacancies: 67 posts of Senior Resident (Non DM/MCh.).

faq.question: Q3. Can I apply for multiple departments?
faq.answer: No. A candidate can apply for only one department only. If you want to apply for another department, you must choose carefully before submitting.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Clinical departments: MD/MS/DNB/MDS in the relevant specialty. Anatomy, Biochemistry: MD/DNB or M.Sc. (Human Anatomy/Biochemistry) with PhD. School of Public Health: MD/DNB in Community Medicine/PSM or MPH with PhD. Qualifying exam result deadline: Must be declared by 31st August 2026; later results lead to cancellation of candidature.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit and relaxation?
faq.answer: Upper age limit: 45 years as on 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale and tenure of appointment?
faq.answer: Pay: ₹67,700/- per month (Level-11, 7th CPC) + NPA (for medical candidates) + other allowances.

faq.question: Q7. How is the selection done?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a 100-mark merit system: 50% – MCQ-based written examination 30% – Academic record (MBBS/BDS marks, extra attempts, PubMed-indexed publications) 20% – Personal interview
